channel.title: Posts on Uppercrust Labs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Uppercrust Labs

item.title: Snap1
item.description: There are times when you need to extract a particular word or line from a long text. But you are unable to do that easily. I faced this issue for quite some time whenever I tried to extract something from a website. Either the website prevents me from doing that, or else my phone also complicates my work. Then while searching on the Google Play Store, I came across this Snaptext extractor. I tried this extraction tool. And honestly, this text extraction software is like a blessing for those times when you literally fight with your phone to extract a line. Moving on, let’s get some ideas on the same.
